curation.synopsis: The macro-transporter Eagle's Talon is gone, ripped open above Tallarn by an Imperial Fists boarding action, and the wreck-fall has gutted both armies on the southern continent. Among the bodies and the slow-cooling dust the Iron Warriors Warsmith Koparnos drags himself out of his armour's life-support and back into the world. Alone in a corpse-strewn wasteland that was a battlefield only hours ago, he must scavenge, repair and read the wreckage - until he comes across a downed Warlord-class titan, Ostentio Contritio, with the faintest flicker still alive in its helm. The traitor mind that crawls towards her is patient and cold, and what he finds when he reaches her cockpit will reshape the war for both sides.
